Title: __min_notnull
Description: Returns minimum value among all its arguments, ignoring NULLs entirely.

The function returns the minimum value among all values in all its arguments by
  	ignoring NULLs entirely.
Examples:
SQL> select __min_notnull (null, 1, 0);
__min_notnull
VARCHAR
0
1 Rows. -- 0 msec.
SQL> select __min (null, 1, 0);
__min
VARCHAR
NULL
1 Rows. -- 0 msec.
